mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${prefix}PROCESS_DEF_VAR_NAME_LOOKUP (PROCESS_DEFINITION_KEY, VAR_NAME) VALUES (#{processDefinitionKey, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{varName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) ON CONFLICT (PROCESS_DEFINITION_KEY, VAR_NAME) DO NOTHING
INSERT IGNORE INTO ${prefix}PROCESS_DEF_VAR_NAME_LOOKUP (PROCESS_DEFINITION_KEY, VAR_NAME) VALUES (#{processDefinitionKey, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{varName, jdbcType=NVARCHAR})
INSERT IGNORE INTO ${prefix}PROCESS_DEF_VAR_NAME_LOOKUP (PROCESS_DEFINITION_KEY, VAR_NAME) VALUES (#{processDefinitionKey, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{varName, jdbcType=NVARCHAR})

MERGE INTO ${prefix}PROCESS_DEF_VAR_NAME_LOOKUP t USING (SELECT CAST(#{processDefinitionKey} AS BIGINT) AS PROCESS_DEFINITION_KEY, CAST(#{varName} AS VARCHAR) AS VAR_NAME) s ON (t.PROCESS_DEFINITION_KEY = s.PROCESS_DEFINITION_KEY AND t.VAR_NAME = s.VAR_NAME) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (PROCESS_DEFINITION_KEY, VAR_NAME) VALUES (s.PROCESS_DEFINITION_KEY, s.VAR_NAME)

MERGE INTO ${prefix}PROCESS_DEF_VAR_NAME_LOOKUP t USING (SELECT #{processDefinitionKey, jdbcType=BIGINT} AS PROCESS_DEFINITION_KEY, #{varName, jdbcType=NVARCHAR} AS VAR_NAME FROM dual) s ON (t.PROCESS_DEFINITION_KEY = s.PROCESS_DEFINITION_KEY AND t.VAR_NAME = s.VAR_NAME) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (PROCESS_DEFINITION_KEY, VAR_NAME) VALUES (s.PROCESS_DEFINITION_KEY, s.VAR_NAME)

MERGE ${prefix}PROCESS_DEF_VAR_NAME_LOOKUP AS target USING (SELECT #{processDefinitionKey, jdbcType=BIGINT} AS PROCESS_DEFINITION_KEY, #{varName, jdbcType=NVARCHAR} AS VAR_NAME) AS source ON (target.PROCESS_DEFINITION_KEY = source.PROCESS_DEFINITION_KEY AND target.VAR_NAME = source.VAR_NAME) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (PROCESS_DEFINITION_KEY, VAR_NAME) VALUES (source.PROCESS_DEFINITION_KEY, source.VAR_NAME);
